FOnline ThirdParty pruning notes

This vendored copy is intentionally trimmed for the engine build. When updating
from upstream, remove these paths again after copying the new version.

Removed paths:
- backends/
- docs/
- examples/
- imgui_demo.cpp
- misc/cpp/
- misc/fonts/
- misc/freetype/
- misc/single_file/
- .editorconfig
- .gitattributes
- .github/
- .gitignore
- misc/README.txt
- misc/debuggers/imgui.gdb
- misc/debuggers/imgui.natstepfilter
- misc/debuggers/imgui_lldb.py
- misc/debuggers/README.txt
